description:
Converts vector direction from world to model space in [[Simulation vs Render Time Scope|render time scope]].
{{Feature|important|For [[setObjectScale|scaled objects]], the resulting vector's [[vectorMagnitude|magnitude]] will be [[vectorMultiply|divided]] by the object scale.}}
examples:
Convert world space vector [0,-10,4] to model space of object _airplane:
<sqf>private _vector = _airplane vectorWorldToModelVisual [0,-10,4];</sqf>
name: vectorWorldToModelVisual

ret.desc: vector direction in model space in format [x,y,z]

Item.desc: vector direction in world space in format [x,y,z]
Item.name: worldDir
